decision_trigger: Complaint acknowledged but no substantive action followed.
recall_question: What happens when acknowledgement is provided without action?
desired_outcome: A substantive response and evidence-based next step
rules_or_procedures: External escalation route after internal process delay
constraints: Need to preserve an accurate chronology

actors.name: Complainant
actors.likely_behaviour: preserve records, follow up, and escalate if necessary

actors.name: Administrative Office
actors.incentive_or_pressure: manage workload and reduce procedural exposure
actors.likely_behaviour: acknowledge receipt but delay substantive engagement

actors.name: Oversight Reviewer
actors.role_in_case: reviewing the complaint if escalation occurs
actors.incentive_or_pressure: remain within remit and evidential thresholds
actors.likely_behaviour: request chronology and supporting records before progressing

evidence_bundle.label: Initial complaint email
evidence_bundle.relevance: Shows when the complaint was first submitted

evidence_bundle.label: Acknowledgement email
evidence_bundle.relevance: Confirms receipt of complaint without substantive action

evidence_bundle.label: Follow-up note
evidence_bundle.relevance: Records absence of substantive response after acknowledgement

deadlines.label: Internal response deadline
deadlines.consequence: Missed deadline strengthens basis for escalation

timeline.label: Complaint submitted
timeline.description: Formal complaint submitted to the institution.

timeline.label: Acknowledgement received
timeline.description: Institution acknowledged receipt of the complaint.

timeline.label: No substantive action
timeline.description: No substantive response or action followed acknowledgement.

escalation_paths.name: Internal procedural follow-up
escalation_paths.likely_response: A narrow reply or further delay

escalation_paths.name: External oversight escalation
escalation_paths.trigger: Internal route appears stalled or exhausted
escalation_paths.likely_response: Request for chronology and evidence bundle

linked_cases.note: Earlier complaint involving delay by the same body

structural_insight: Acknowledgement without substantive action can create the appearance of engagement while resolution does not progress.
personal_positioning: The complainant is waiting for a substantive response while preserving a clear record.
decision_note: Preserve chronology, wait for deadline expiry, then escalate if no substantive reply appears.
learning_capture: Acknowledgement is not the same as action.
